children.heading: .—Authority of Secretary
children.label: a .—Authority of Secretary
children.text: The Secretary of the Army may employ as many civilians as professors, instructors, and lecturers at the Army War College or the United States Army Command and General Staff College as the Secretary considers necessary.

children.heading: .—Compensation of Faculty Members
children.label: b .—Compensation of Faculty Members
children.text: The compensation of persons employed under this section shall be as prescribed by the Secretary.

Except as provided in paragraph (2), this section shall apply with respect to persons who are selected by the Secretary for employment as professors, instructors, and lecturers at the Army War College or the United States Army Command and General Staff College after the end of the 90-day period beginning on .November 29, 1989

This section shall not apply with respect to professors, instructors, and lecturers employed at the Army War College or the United States Army Command and General Staff College if the duration of the principal course of instruction offered at the college involved is less than 10 months.
